input_text:
# Tristana

Tristana puede referirse a:

Tristana (novela), (1892) novela de Benito Pérez Galdós.
instruction: Extrae los metadatos bibliográficos básicos (título, autor, año de publicación, géneros, temas clave e idioma original) de la obra literaria descrita en el texto.

target_schema.description:
Extracts basic bibliographic metadata and key themes from a book description or encyclopedia entry.
Complexity: L2 (Explicit Information Retrieval).

title.description: The official title of the literary work
title.title: Title

author.description: The primary author or creator of the work
author.title: Author

publication_year.description: The year the work was first published
publication_year.title: Publication Year

genres.description: Literary genres associated with the work (e.g., 'Science Fiction', 'Romance')
genres.title: Genres

key_themes.description: Main topics or themes explored in the work
key_themes.title: Key Themes

original_language.description: The language in which the work was originally written
original_language.title: Original Language

target_schema.title: LiteraryWork
